entity_health_bars.description: Classic MOBA HP bars over the player's hero, allied minions, towers, and every enemy hero/minion/tower. Heroes 500 HP, towers 1500 HP, minions 80 HP — bars are how the player reads the lane.

minion_spawner.description: Spawns minion waves for both teams periodically

gold_system.description: Tracks player gold and kill count
